message:
fix(sync): prevent stale waker retention, lost wakes, and silent panic swallowing in concurrency primitives

MPSC channel: clear recv_waker on successful receive and on disconnect
detection, preventing stale waker retention that could cause spurious
wake cycles or hold references to dropped tasks.

Semaphore: always wake the next queued waiter when an AcquireFuture is
dropped, regardless of current permit count. The previous conditional
(only wake if permits > 0) could lose wake signals when a waiter was
cancelled while permits were exhausted but another release was in flight.

Pool: removed the destroy() method from AsyncResourceFactory (resources
are cleaned up via Drop). Extracted wait_duration variable for clarity
and added record_wait_time call on timeout path.

Bulkhead: removed redundant per-entry cancellation loop before
queue.clear() — the clear already drops all entries and their results.

Race combinator: renamed winner_index to index in the Panicked variant
since a panic can come from any branch, not just the winner. race2
now propagates loser panics instead of silently discarding them.
Scope::race similarly propagates panics from the losing branch via
JoinError::Panicked rather than silently joining and ignoring.

Rate limiter: minor cleanup in rate limit combinator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
